creator: mt-bugs@markoturk.info
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #1)

Yes, that's on my TODO list.

Currently there is an issue with some sed commands when building doc for newsboat on FreeBSD. I talked to newsboat maintainers and it's fixed upstream but only in git (not released yet).

When they make a new release, I'll update this port and package the man page also.

/Marko
